title: 8 Soothing Herbal Teas for Bariatrics to Overcome Burping
description: Cinnamomum verum teas, also known as Ceylon cinnamon, have been traditionally used to help with burping. The teas contain a compound called cinnamaldehyde, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe the digestive system. Cinnamaldehyde also has antispasmodic properties, which can help to calm down the muscles in the digestive tract and prevent excessive gas production, leading to burping.
